title: Kitten explorer
facts: An orange kitten emerges from green foliage, walks forward across dirt, and maintains eye contact with the camera.

captions.formal: An orange kitten emerges from green foliage and walks forward. The kitten maintains eye contact with the camera while traversing the dirt ground.
captions.sarcastic: An orange kitten emerges from the foliage, clearly convinced it is the apex predator of this vast, three-foot garden.
captions.humorous_tech: A small orange kitten initiates a forward-walk sequence and maintains a steady lock on the camera's sensor.
captions.humorous_non_tech: A tiny explorer clears the backyard jungle and decides the camera is the first territory of a new empire.

title: Office debugging loop
facts: A woman alternates between typing and looking at a computer monitor with a puzzled expression in an office.

captions.formal: A woman types on a keyboard and looks at a computer monitor in an office setting, repeatedly alternating between typing and viewing the screen.
captions.sarcastic: A woman demonstrates a masterful strategy of typing a few words and then staring at the screen in total confusion.
captions.humorous_tech: The user is stuck in an infinite loop: type a few characters, trigger a confused expression, and repeat.
captions.humorous_non_tech: She types a bit, looks up, and blinks, as if the computer might magically explain itself if she stares hard enough.
